subject: Databases
title: Cloudflare DNS Outage 2020
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Cloudflare DNS Outage 2020.

hook.text: July 2020. A Cloudflare router misconfiguration takes down DNS for 27 minutes. Half the internet feels it.

buildup.text: Databases behind Cloudflare-proxied domains became unreachable. API servers returned errors globally.

discovery.text: A single bad route announcement cascaded. One router's config affected traffic to millions of domains.

twist.text: 27 minutes doesn't sound long. But for payment processors and health services, even seconds of downtime matter.

climax.text: Lesson: infrastructure dependencies are invisible until they break. Map your full dependency chain.

punchline.text: Database uptime depends on every layer below: DNS, network, cloud. Map them.

quiz.question: What lesson does the Cloudflare outage teach about database availability?
options: Database uptime depends on infrastructure layers like DNS and networking that are often invisible
DNS has no impact on database availability
